void Set_Alarm_From_String(char *str) {

__STATIC_INLINE void __NVIC_ClearPendingIRQ(IRQn_Type IRQn)
{
  if ((int32_t)(IRQn) >= 0)
  {
    NVIC->ICPR[(((uint32_t)IRQn) >> 5UL)] = (uint32_t)(1UL << (((uint32_t)IRQn) & 0x1FUL));

void RTC_Alarm_IRQHandler(void)
{
	// 알람 인터럽트 플래그가 세팅되었는지 확인
    if (EXTI->PR & (1 << 17)) // RTC Alarm은 보통 EXTI 라인 17에 연결됨

080024f4 <TIM3_Out_Freq_Generation>:

void TIM3_Out_Freq_Generation(unsigned short freq)
{
	// 1. 쉼표(REST) 처리를 아예 함수 맨 앞단에서 해버리기
    if (freq == REST) {
        TIM3->CR1 = 0; // 타이머 카운터 정지 (소리 끔)
 80024f4:	4b0f      	ldr	r3, [pc, #60]	@ (8002534 <TIM3_Out_Freq_Generation+0x40>)
    if (freq == REST) {
 80024f6:	b1d0      	cbz	r0, 800252e <TIM3_Out_Freq_Generation+0x3a>
    }

	// Timer 주파수가 TIM3_FREQ가 되도록 PSC 설정
	TIM3->PSC = 11;									//96MHz / 8MHz = 12 - 1 = 11
	// 요청한 주파수가 되도록 ARR 설정
	TIM3->ARR = (8000000 / freq) - 1;
 80024f8:	4a0f      	ldr	r2, [pc, #60]	@ (8002538 <TIM3_Out_Freq_Generation+0x44>)
 80024fa:	fbb2 f2f0 	udiv	r2, r2, r0
	TIM3->PSC = 11;									//96MHz / 8MHz = 12 - 1 = 11
 80024fe:	210b      	movs	r1, #11
	TIM3->ARR = (8000000 / freq) - 1;
 8002500:	3a01      	subs	r2, #1
	TIM3->PSC = 11;									//96MHz / 8MHz = 12 - 1 = 11
 8002502:	6299      	str	r1, [r3, #40]	@ 0x28
	TIM3->ARR = (8000000 / freq) - 1;
 8002504:	62da      	str	r2, [r3, #44]	@ 0x2c
	// Duty Rate 50%가 되도록 CCR3 설정
	TIM3->CCR3 = TIM3->ARR / 2;				//Duty Rate가 50%가 되려면 ARR / 2
 8002506:	6ada      	ldr	r2, [r3, #44]	@ 0x2c
 8002508:	0852      	lsrs	r2, r2, #1
 800250a:	63da      	str	r2, [r3, #60]	@ 0x3c
	// Manual Update(UG 발생)
	Macro_Set_Bit(TIM3->SR, 0);
 800250c:	691a      	ldr	r2, [r3, #16]
 800250e:	f042 0201 	orr.w	r2, r2, #1
 8002512:	611a      	str	r2, [r3, #16]
	// Down Counter, Repeat Mode, Timer Start
	Macro_Set_Bit(TIM3->CR1, 4);
 8002514:	681a      	ldr	r2, [r3, #0]
 8002516:	f042 0210 	orr.w	r2, r2, #16

	Macro_Clear_Bit(TIM3->CR1, 3);

 800251e:	f022 0208 	bic.w	r2, r2, #8
 8002522:	601a      	str	r2, [r3, #0]
	Macro_Set_Bit(TIM3->CR1, 0);
 8002524:	681a      	ldr	r2, [r3, #0]
 8002526:	f042 0201 	orr.w	r2, r2, #1
 800252a:	601a      	str	r2, [r3, #0]

}
